[2018-03-24 20:33] themightyflango (non alpha pleb): "destroy a non-back-row, non-drone unit with 1 health"
[2018-03-24 20:34] darkeisbein: how about: "at the start of your turn gain :Attack:"?
[2018-03-24 20:34] themightyflango (non alpha pleb): hmm, nice and simple
[2018-03-24 20:34] themightyflango (non alpha pleb): "deal 1 damage to a blocker"
[2018-03-24 20:36] .bky_1556 (bky): And we're back to SDR saying you can't punish units for blocking.
[2018-03-24 20:37] themightyflango (non alpha pleb): who's SDR and why do I care what he says
[2018-03-24 20:38] darkeisbein: what even is the point such a unit? Just straight out killing granularity seems boring
[2018-03-24 20:38] themightyflango (non alpha pleb): I think the guy was salty and wanted a gauss-charge killer(?)
[2018-03-24 20:39] themightyflango (non alpha pleb): although new mechanic strat:
[2018-03-24 20:40] themightyflango (non alpha pleb): :Click: : Destroy a base-set unit and pay :Attack: equal to twice its :Health:
[2018-03-24 20:40] .bky_1556 (bky): SDR = "Shalev's Domination Rules" a.k.a. "Shalev's Rule
[2018-03-24 20:40] .bky_1556 (bky): == "More of X is better than less of X" for several Xes.
[2018-03-24 20:41] darkeisbein: pay two :Attack:  to kill a Tarsier or drone 😮
[2018-03-24 20:41] .bky_1556 (bky): Tarsier and Drone are the only appealing targets, yes.
[2018-03-24 20:41] darkeisbein: yeah seems like a very specific unit
[2018-03-24 20:41] .bky_1556 (bky): Animus is situationally worth hitting.
[2018-03-24 20:42] .bky_1556 (bky): Gauss Cannon = only if they binge on Plexos
[2018-03-24 20:42] themightyflango (non alpha pleb): 10 :Attack: to kill a single goose cannon is no
[2018-03-24 20:43] .bky_1556 (bky): What else are you doing with that 10 :Attack: into wall + double plexo?
[2018-03-24 20:43] darkeisbein: seems overall like very specific hate
[2018-03-24 20:43] themightyflango (non alpha pleb): yeah, maybe it should be changed to "non base-set unit"
[2018-03-24 20:43] .bky_1556 (bky): I suppose you could hit the wall.
[2018-03-24 20:43] themightyflango (non alpha pleb): but then they can hit each other
[2018-03-24 20:44] .bky_1556 (bky): Doomed wall + double plexo.
[2018-03-24 20:44] themightyflango (non alpha pleb): SDR probably has a lot to say about that unit if it hits any non BST
[2018-03-24 20:44] darkeisbein: Kill effects are horrible design anyways
[2018-03-24 20:44] .bky_1556 (bky): Actually, it's SDR compliant as an Apollo derivative.
[2018-03-24 20:45] darkeisbein: like I have no problem with apollo existing as a one of thing
[2018-03-24 20:45] .bky_1556 (bky): Kinetic driver and Deadeye already exist.
[2018-03-24 20:45] darkeisbein: yeah but those are very specific in what they do
[2018-03-24 20:46] darkeisbein: I see deadeye as an econ-unit
[2018-03-24 20:47] darkeisbein: I just don't like they way killspells in CCGs lead to units only being good if they do a ton of stuff on the turn they come out
[2018-03-24 20:48] darkeisbein: like there could be so many cool units in those games if it weren't for kill spells making all designs that don't do something turn 1 meaningless
[2018-03-24 20:50] themightyflango (non alpha pleb): hell in the game that shall not be named, a 4-mana 7/7 is considered meh
[2018-03-24 20:50] themightyflango (non alpha pleb): because killspells and insane board clears are just too common
[2018-03-24 20:54] http404error: It's an interesting click ability
[2018-03-24 20:54] http404error: I think just killing engineers best accomplishes the intent though
[2018-03-24 20:55] http404error: Otherwise I think it should be able to snipe any unit like a mini Apollo
[2018-03-24 20:55] http404error: It's close to being something neat and unique though
